notableEvents.label: Nolan Arenado GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nolan Arenado grounds into a double play, third baseman Kevin McGonigle to second baseman Gleyber Torres to first baseman Colt Keith. Ildemaro Vargas out at 2nd. Nolan Arenado out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jose Fernandez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jose Fernandez grounds into a double play, third baseman Kevin McGonigle to second baseman Gleyber Torres to first baseman Colt Keith. Nolan Arenado out at 2nd. Jose Fernandez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Tim Tawa reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Tim Tawa reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Javier Báez.
